rooms.shortDescription: Cozy and private bungalows surrounded by tropical greenery.
rooms.longDescription: Nestled beside the garden path, this bungalow is made for slow mornings, cool afternoons and quiet nights close to nature.
rooms.title: Garden Bungalow

rooms.shortDescription: Spacious rooms with private balcony overlooking the pool.
rooms.longDescription: A generous room with refined natural textures, a shaded balcony and easy access to the pool terrace.
rooms.title: Deluxe Pool View

rooms.shortDescription: Elegant villa with extra space, privacy and pool access.
rooms.longDescription: The most private stay at COZY Koh Tao, designed for unhurried days between the terrace, pool and tropical canopy.
rooms.title: COZY Pool Villa
